untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detecting 'late-month calendar period' and 'historical clustering of monthly highs at month-end'. These require calendar date comparisons (day-of-month >= ~15) and statistical pattern analysis across multiple months, neither of which are available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators provide only intra-bar and recent technical measures, not calendar date logic or multi-month clustering detection.
translation_notes: Signal relies on calendar-based timing ('final 1-2 weeks of month') and historical price pattern clustering that cannot be expressed with the available technical indicators. A practical implementation would require custom date logic (e.g., 'day_of_month >= 15') and statistical backtesting across month boundaries, which fall outside the scope of single-bar technical conditions.
